name: Tibor: Tale of a Kind Vampire
short_description: This warm and cute jump n' run platformer game will provide hours and hours of fun to both grownups and kids. A classic platformer game with huge levels, secrets to discover and treasures to collects.
detailed_description:
This warm and cute adventure platformer game will provide hours and hours of fun to both grownups and kids. A classic platformer jump and run game with huge levels, secrets to discover and treasures to collects.

The evil countess turns Tibor into a vampire! Only, Tibor is an unique vampire - a kind one! A vampire whose love for Agnes is stronger than any other force.

Play through dozens of exciting and rich levels, discover tons of secret locations, collect coins, diamonds and potions, all while enjoying beautiful landscapes in this fun platformer game!

The game will appeal to both children and adults; it's just fun to jump around, discover new places, overcome obstacles and collect coins.

🔎 What awaits you

• Storybook charm: Based on a beloved Croatian fairy tale.

• Smooth platforming: Improved controls with gamepad support even on your smartphone

• Kid-safe fun: No graphic violence — ideal for family play.

• Collectibles & secrets: Re-playable levels with exploration rewards.

  • BASED on the popular Croatian fairy tale

  • NO VIOLENCE; makes it perfect for all ages

  • DISCOVER 5 different worlds

  • DOZENS of huge levels to explore

  • FIND many secret places and BONUS levels

  • COLLECT coins, diamonds, potions and other treasures

  • BEAUTIFUL 4K ultra HD graphics

supported_languages:
English*, Croatian*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Russian, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
